description: Currently, seven people are injured in the hospital after the Russian attack on Zaporizhzhia, and some more people are undergoing the necessary examinations. A total of 37 victims. It was a strike by guided aerial bombs. Simply because of the civil infrastructure of the city, the Russians do not limit themselves in the destruction of life. This is an absolutely cynical terrorist attack devoid of any military meaning. Not a day such Russian strikes on...

title: Kramatorsk: Casualties reported
description: In Kramatorsk, Donetsk region, a rescue operation is underway at the site of a Russian airstrike. They just hit the city center, people. As of now, at least five people are known to have been injured and five killed. Sincere condolences to family and friends. Unfortunately, the number of victims may increase. Now all services are working on the spot: rescuers, doctors - they are helping people.
description_en: In Kramatorsk, Donetsk region, a rescue operation is underway at the site of a Russian airstrike. They just hit the city center, people. As of now, at least five people are known to have been injured and five killed. Sincere condolences to family and friends. Unfortunately, the number of victims may increase. Now all services are working on the spot: rescuers, doctors - they are helping people.
description_uk: У Краматорську на Донеччині триває рятувальна операція на місці російського удару авіабомбами. Вдарили просто по центру міста, по людях. Станом на зараз відомо щонайменше про п’ятьох поранених та п’ятьох убитих людей. Щирі співчуття рідним і близьким. На жаль, кількість жертв може стати більшою. Зараз на місці працюють усі служби: рятувальники, медики – надають допомогу людям.

title: Attack attack on infrastructure
description: It is estimated that the comprehensive attack by units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine in April and May 1 resulted in damage to the port infrastructure of Tuapse and the Tuapse Refinery in the amount of more than 300 million US dollars.
description_en: It is estimated that the comprehensive attack by units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine in April and May 1 resulted in damage to the port infrastructure of Tuapse and the Tuapse Refinery in the amount of more than 300 million US dollars.

title: Kharkiv: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Russian mass attack on Ukrainian oil, gas infrastructure kills 5. Naftogaz said in a May 5 Telegram post that three of their employees as well as two members of Ukraine's State Emergency Services died in the overnight strikes, which targeted facilities in Poltava and Kharkiv oblasts and included both drones and ballistic missiles.

title: Kharkiv: Shelling near civilians
description: At night, the Russians attacked the energy infrastructure in Poltava Oblast. And very meanly, they hit again with a rocket, when the emergency services workers were already on the spot - eliminating the fire. As of now, it is known about dozens of wounded. Unfortunately, four people were killed, including two rescuers. These are Hero of Ukraine Viktor Kuzmenko, who eliminated the consequences of shelling more than 50 times, and Dmytro Skryl, who...

Станом на зараз відомо про десятки поранених. На жаль, чотири людини було вбито і серед них двоє рятувальників. The full-scale war radically changed not only the scale of the tasks, but also their very essence. If earlier it was mainly about interaction and humanitarian support, today the structure of the Central Security Service is...

If earlier it was mainly about interaction and humanitarian support, today the structure of the Central Security Service is...
description_uk: Цивільно-військове співробітництво в Збройних Силах України пройшло шлях від пілотного проєкту у 2014 році до системної складової, без якої сьогодні неможливо уявити виконання завдань військами на всіх рівнях. Повномасштабна війна кардинально змінила не лише масштаби завдань, а й саму їхню суть. Якщо раніше йшлося переважно про взаємодію та гуманітарну підтримку, то сьогодні структура ЦВС – це...

title: Kyiv: Missile attack
description: Update: Ukraine reportedly strikes major oil refinery in Russia's Leningrad Oblast amid large-scale attack. Ukraine reportedly carried out an attack on Russia's Kirishi oil refinery (KINEF) overnight on May 5, Russian Telegram media channels reported, citing monitoring data. The strike comes amid a wider attack on various Russian regions, including an alleged Flamingo missile strike on JSC...
